Class Basket<T>

java.lang.Object
RestaurantGame.Basket<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of elements stored inside the basket
public class Basket<T> extends Object
A Basket is a generic container that stores ingredients of type T up to a specified limit. It supports adding, removing, clearing, printing, and retrieving items.

    • list

      private List<T> list

      private int size

    • limit

      public int limit

  • Constructor Details

    • Basket

      public Basket(int limit)
      Creates a Basket with a specified capacity limit.
      Parameters:
      limit - : the maximum number of items the basket can hold

  • Method Details

    • addIngredient

      public boolean addIngredient(T ingredient)
      Attempts to add an ingredient to the basket.
      Parameters:
      ingredient - : the item to add
      Returns:
      true if the item was added successfully, false if the basket is already full

    • clearBasket

      public void clearBasket()
      Removes all items from the basket and resets the size.

    • printList

      public void printList()
      Prints the basket's contents to the console.

    • remove

      public void remove(Toppings topping)
      Removes the specified ingredient from the basket.
      Parameters:
      topping - : the topping to remove from the basket

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Returns the current number of items inside the basket.
      Returns:
      the count of stored items

    • getList

      public ArrayList<T> getList()
      Returns the list of ingredients as an ArrayList.
      Returns:
      the list of items in the basket
